summary: Tested all 16 frontend features of the Sonar mock app. All critical flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal title says 'Generation Preview' not 'Cost Preview' as expected in test spec

issues: Coder/Debugger agents not visible without scrolling in the left panel - agent list is cut off at bottom

action_items: Minor: CostPreviewModal title shows 'Generation Preview' instead of 'Cost Preview' - cosmetic only
Minor: Left agent panel may need scroll to show Coder/Debugger agents during generation
critical_code_review_comments: All major flows working: landing, modal, builder, agents, code streaming, preview, deploy
Model selector shows GPT-4o (checked), Claude 4 Sonnet, Gemini 3 Pro - all correct
Terminal shows deploy logs correctly after generation completes
E-1/E-2 toggle visible and clickable in top bar
Credits counter and cost/time shown in top bar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend mock app. All data is MOCKED. Generation flow takes 25-28 seconds. Landing page, modal, builder, agents, code editor, preview, terminal all tested and working. Minor: modal title says 'Generation Preview' not 'Cost Preview'.
